tr.td: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Human isophane insulin 70 unit/mL and recombinant human regular insulin 30 unit/mL solution for injection
Inject 10 units (0.1 mL) subcutaneously before breakfast and before dinner
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Patient will implement and maintain a diabetes self-management plan including dietary changes, physical activity, and regular blood glucose monitoring to prevent progression to type 2 diabetes.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Maintain fasting blood glucose less than 100 mg/dL.
Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight to improve insulin sensitivity and metabolic health.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Limit daily sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams to support blood pressure control.
Achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve blood pressure control.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.

tr.td: Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported

tr.td: Development of individualized plan of care

display.value: Development of individualized plan of care (procedure)

text.value: Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Patient will implement and maintain a diabetes self-management plan including dietary changes, physical activity, and regular blood glucose monitoring to prevent progression to type 2 diabetes.
Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Maintain fasting blood glucose less than 100 mg/dL.
Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight to improve insulin sensitivity and metabolic health.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Limit daily sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams to support blood pressure control.
Achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve blood pressure control.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.
